name: Salt Spray
description: Designs raw, beach-textured hair. Creates a messy, undone look, adding volume, texture, and control. Great at thickening fine hair. Use on all types of hair.
howToUse: Spray onto wet or dry hair to create the desired effect.
ingredients: Aqua, VP/VA Copolymer, Sodium Chloride, Magnesium Sulfate, Panthenol, Parfum, Benzyl Alcohol, Dehydroacetic Acid, PEG-40 Hydrogenated Castor Oil, Triethanolamine, Benzyl Benzoate, Coumarin.
